Off Calendar May-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DEMARCHE RAGLER's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
